steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Computing financial indicators for Auren Energia based on provided data
from math import isfinite
# Input values (latest = 2025-03-31 ÚLTIMO, previous annual = 2024 full year, q1 2024 = PENÚLTIMO in main qtr dataset)
# Latest (2025-03-31)
Ativo = 52266696000.0
Ativo_Circulante = 11093981000.0
Caixa = 6131027000.0
Aplicacoes = 31449000.0
Disponibilidades = Caixa + Aplicacoes
Ativo_Nao_Circulante = 41172715000.0
Passivo_Circulante = 7643912000.0
Passivo_Nao_Circulante = 30044036000.0
Patrimonio_Liq = 14578748000.0
Fornecedores = 1037407000.0
# Debt
Emp_cur = 2438563000.0
Emp_noncur = 23723201000.0
Div_Bruta = Emp_cur + Emp_noncur
# Shares
total_shares_issued = 1050378000
treasury = 5400000
outstanding = total_shares_issued - treasury
price = 10.07
market_cap = price * outstanding
# Quarter and annual numbers
# Q1 2025 (ÚLTIMO main quarter)
rev_q1_2025 = 2952303000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 991459000.0
net_q1_2025 = 53997000.0
net_attrib_q1_2025 = 8496000.0
res_bruto_q1_2025 = 836269000.0
# Depreciation/retentions Q1 2025 from 7.04.01 is -390472000.0 (negative expense)
dep_q1_2025 = -390472000.0
# Q1 2024 (PENÚLTIMO in main quarter)
rev_q1_2024 = 1397531000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 499841000.0
net_q1_2024 = 253618000.0
net_attrib_q1_2024 = 253618000.0
res_bruto_q1_2024 = 282893000.0
dep_q1_2024 = -158248000.0
# Annual 2024 (ÚLTIMO in previous annual dataset)
rev_2024 = 8059951000.0
ebit_2024 = 1291665000.0
net_2024 = 271869000.0
net_attrib_2024 = 250938000.0
res_bruto_2024 = 1429003000.0
dep_2024 = -637363000.0
# TTM calculations: TTM = annual_2024 + Q1_2025 - Q1_2024
rev_ttm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ttm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ttm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
net_attrib_ttm = net_attrib_2024 + net_attrib_q1_2025 - net_attrib_q1_2024
res_bruto_ttm = res_bruto_2024 + res_bruto_q1_2025 - res_bruto_q1_2024
dep_ttm = dep_2024 + dep_q1_2025 - dep_q1_2024
# EBITDA TTM = EBIT_TTM + abs(dep_ttm) because dep values are negative expenses
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + (-dep_ttm)
# Capital de giro
cap_giro = Ativo_Circulante - Passivo_Circulante
# Liquidity current
liquidez_corr = Ativo_Circulante / Passivo_Circulante if Passivo_Circulante != 0 else None
# ROE
roe = (net_ttm / Patrimonio_Liq * 100) if Patrimonio_Liq != 0 else None
# ROIC per definition: EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
den_roic = (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic = (ebit_ttm / den_roic * 100) if den_roic != 0 else None
# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_por_ativo = (ebit_ttm / Ativo * 100) if Ativo != 0 else None
# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = Div_Bruta / Patrimonio_Liq if Patrimonio_Liq != 0 else None
# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / Ativo if Ativo != 0 else None
# P ratios using market cap or price*shares
# Many ratios use Price * shares / metric
def safe_div(n,d):
    return n/d if d and d!=0 else None
# P/L: price / LPA where LPA = net_attrib_ttm / outstanding
lpa = net_attrib_ttm / outstanding if outstanding != 0 else None
pl = price / lpa if lpa and lpa!=0 else None
# P/VP: price / (VPA) where VPA = Patrimonio_Liq / outstanding
vpa = Patrimonio_Liq / outstanding if outstanding != 0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa if vpa and vpa!=0 else None
# P/EBIT = MarketCap / EBIT_TTM
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm and ebit_ttm!=0 else None
# PSR = MarketCap / Rev_TTM
psr = market_cap / rev_ttm if rev_ttm and rev_ttm!=0 else None
# P/Ativos = MarketCap / Ativo
p_ativos = market_cap / Ativo if Ativo and Ativo!=0 else None
# P/Cap. Giro = MarketCap / cap_giro
p_cap_giro = market_cap / cap_giro if cap_giro and cap_giro!=0 else None
# P/Ativ Circ Liq = MarketCap / (Ativo Circulante - Passivo_Circulante) same as cap_giro
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro
# EV
ev = market_cap + Div_Bruta - Disponibilidades
# EV/EBITDA and EV/EBIT
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm and ebitda_ttm!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm and ebit_ttm!=0 else None
# Margins in percentage
marg_bruta = (res_bruto_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm and rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm and rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_liquida = (net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm and rev_ttm!=0 else None
# Prepare output list of indicators
indicators = [
    ("Ativo", Ativo),
    ("Disponibilidades", Disponibilidades),
    ("Ativo Circulante", Ativo_Circulante),
    ("Dív. Bruta", Div_Bruta),
    ("Dív. Líquida", Div_Bruta - Disponibilidades),
    ("Patrim. L�edq", Patrimonio_Liq),
    ("Receita L�edquida (12 meses)", rev_ttm),
    ("EBIT (12 meses)", ebit_ttm),
    ("Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)", net_ttm),
    ("Receita L�edquida (3 meses)", rev_q1_2025),
    ("EBIT (3 meses)", ebit_q1_2025),
    ("Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)", net_q1_2025),
    ("P/L", pl if pl and isfinite(pl) else None),
    ("P/VP", p_vp if p_vp and isfinite(p_vp) else None),
    ("P/EBIT", p_ebit if p_ebit and isfinite(p_ebit) else None),
    ("PSR", psr if psr and isfinite(psr) else None),
    ("P/Ativos", p_ativos if p_ativos and isfinite(p_ativos) else None),
    ("P/Cap. Giro", p_cap_giro if p_cap_giro and isfinite(p_cap_giro) else None),
    ("P/Ativ Circ Liq", p_ativ_circ_liq if p_ativ_circ_liq and isfinite(p_ativ_circ_liq) else None),
    ("EV / EBITDA", ev_ebitda if ev_ebitda and isfinite(ev_ebitda) else None),
    ("EV / EBIT", ev_ebit if ev_ebit and isfinite(ev_ebit) else None),
    ("LPA", lpa),
    ("VPA", vpa),
    ("Marg. Bruta", marg_bruta),
    ("Marg. EBIT", marg_ebit),
    ("Marg. L�edquida", marg_liquida),
    ("EBIT / Ativo", ebit_por_ativo),
    ("ROIC", roic),
    ("ROE", roe),
    ("Liquidez Corr", liquidez_corr),
    ("Div Br/ Patrim", divbr_patrim),
    ("Giro Ativos", giro_ativos),
]
# Format None as N/A and percentage values already as percent numbers
output = []
for name, val in indicators:
    if val is None or (isinstance(val,float) and (not isfinite(val))):
        v = None
    else:
        v = float(val)
    output.append({"indicator": name, "value": v})
# Print output as JSON
import json
print(json.dumps({"indicators": output}, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Recompute with correct indicator names (no embedded null)
from math import isfinite
# Latest (2025-03-31)
Ativo = 52266696000.0
Ativo_Circulante = 11093981000.0
Caixa = 6131027000.0
Aplicacoes = 31449000.0
Disponibilidades = Caixa + Aplicacoes
Patrim_Liq = 14578748000.0
Passivo_Circulante = 7643912000.0
Fornecedores = 1037407000.0
# Debt
Emp_cur = 2438563000.0
Emp_noncur = 23723201000.0
Div_Bruta = Emp_cur + Emp_noncur
# Shares
total_shares_issued = 1050378000
treasury = 5400000
outstanding = total_shares_issued - treasury
price = 10.07
market_cap = price * outstanding
# Quarter and annual numbers
# Q1 2025 (ÚLTIMO main quarter)
rev_q1_2025 = 2952303000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 991459000.0
net_q1_2025 = 53997000.0
net_attrib_q1_2025 = 8496000.0
res_bruto_q1_2025 = 836269000.0
dep_q1_2025 = -390472000.0
# Q1 2024 (PENÚLTIMO in main quarter)
rev_q1_2024 = 1397531000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 499841000.0
net_q1_2024 = 253618000.0
net_attrib_q1_2024 = 253618000.0
res_bruto_q1_2024 = 282893000.0
dep_q1_2024 = -158248000.0
# Annual 2024 (ÚLTIMO in previous annual dataset)
rev_2024 = 8059951000.0
ebit_2024 = 1291665000.0
net_2024 = 271869000.0
net_attrib_2024 = 250938000.0
res_bruto_2024 = 1429003000.0
dep_2024 = -637363000.0
# TTM calculations: TTM = annual_2024 + Q1_2025 - Q1_2024
rev_ttm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ttm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ttm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
net_attrib_ttm = net_attrib_2024 + net_attrib_q1_2025 - net_attrib_q1_2024
res_bruto_ttm = res_bruto_2024 + res_bruto_q1_2025 - res_bruto_q1_2024
dep_ttm = dep_2024 + dep_q1_2025 - dep_q1_2024
# EBITDA TTM = EBIT_TTM + abs(dep_ttm)
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + (-dep_ttm)
# Capital de giro
cap_giro = Ativo_Circulante - Passivo_Circulante
# Liquidity current
liquidez_corr = Ativo_Circulante / Passivo_Circulante if Passivo_Circulante != 0 else None
# ROE
roe = (net_ttm / Patrim_Liq * 100) if Patrim_Liq != 0 else None
# ROIC per definition: EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
den_roic = (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic = (ebit_ttm / den_roic * 100) if den_roic != 0 else None
# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_por_ativo = (ebit_ttm / Ativo * 100) if Ativo != 0 else None
# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = Div_Bruta / Patrim_Liq if Patrim_Liq != 0 else None
# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / Ativo if Ativo != 0 else None
# P ratios using market cap or price*shares
# P/L: price / LPA where LPA = net_attrib_ttm / outstanding
lpa = net_attrib_ttm / outstanding if outstanding != 0 else None
pl = price / lpa if lpa and lpa!=0 else None
# P/VP: price / (VPA) where VPA = Patrim_Liq / outstanding
vpa = Patrim_Liq / outstanding if outstanding != 0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa if vpa and vpa!=0 else None
# P/EBIT = MarketCap / EBIT_TTM
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm and ebit_ttm!=0 else None
# PSR = MarketCap / Rev_TTM
psr = market_cap / rev_ttm if rev_ttm and rev_ttm!=0 else None
# P/Ativos = MarketCap / Ativo
p_ativos = market_cap / Ativo if Ativo and Ativo!=0 else None
# P/Cap. Giro = MarketCap / cap_giro
p_cap_giro = market_cap / cap_giro if cap_giro and cap_giro!=0 else None
# P/Ativ Circ Liq = same
p_ativ_circ_liq = p_cap_giro
# EV
ev = market_cap + Div_Bruta - Disponibilidades
# EV/EBITDA and EV/EBIT
ev = market_cap + Div_Bruta - Disponibilidades
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm and ebitda_ttm!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm and ebit_ttm!=0 else None
# Margins in percentage
marg_bruta = (res_bruto_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm and rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm and rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_liquida = (net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100) if rev_ttm and rev_ttm!=0 else None
# Prepare output list of indicators using exact enum names
indicators = [
    ("Ativo", Ativo),
    ("Disponibilidades", Disponibilidades),
    ("Ativo Circulante", Ativo_Circulante),
    ("D\u00edv. Bruta", Div_Bruta),
    ("D\u00edv. L\u00edquida", Div_Bruta - Disponibilidades),
    ("Patrim. L\u00edq", Patrim_Liq),
    ("Receita L\u00edquida (12 meses)", rev_ttm),
    ("EBIT (12 meses)", ebit_ttm),
    ("Lucro L\u00edquido (12 meses)", net_ttm),
    ("Receita L\u00edquida (3 meses)", rev_q1_2025),
    ("EBIT (3 meses)", ebit_q1_2025),
    ("Lucro L\u00edquido (3 meses)", net_q1_2025),
    ("P/L", pl),
    ("P/VP", p_vp),
    ("P/EBIT", p_ebit),
    ("PSR", psr),
    ("P/Ativos", p_ativos),
    ("P/Cap. Giro", p_cap_giro),
    ("P/Ativ Circ Liq", p_ativ_circ_liq),
    ("EV / EBITDA", ev_ebitda),
    ("EV / EBIT", ev_ebit),
    ("LPA", lpa),
    ("VPA", vpa),
    ("Marg. Bruta", marg_bruta),
    ("Marg. EBIT", marg_ebit),
    ("Marg. L\u00edquida", marg_liquida),
    ("EBIT / Ativo", ebit_por_ativo),
    ("ROIC", roic),
    ("ROE", roe),
    ("Liquidez Corr", liquidez_corr),
    ("Div Br/ Patrim", divbr_patrim),
    ("Giro Ativos", giro_ativos),
]
# Convert NaN/inf to None and ensure floats
output = []
for name, val in indicators:
    v = None
    try:
        if val is None:
            v = None
        else:
            fv = float(val)
            if not isfinite(fv):
                v = None
            else:
                v = round(fv, 4) if not name.startswith(("Marg.","EBIT /","ROIC","ROE")) else round(fv,4)
    except Exception:
        v = None
    output.append({"indicator": name, "value": v})
import json
print(json.dumps({"indicators": output}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
